text: Open Source Intel Saudi Al Arabiya reports the drones that struck Kuwait were launched from Iraq, not Iran, with the IRGC denying any role in the incident. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：沙特阿拉伯《阿拉伯电视台》报道称，袭击科威特的无人机是从伊拉克而非伊朗发射的，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队否认在事件中扮演任何角色。推文

text: Open Source Intel Eyal Harel will take over as Israeli Navy chief next week, replacing David Saar Salama after a delay linked to the Iran conflict. The handover is now set for Thursday. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042550190838526297/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：埃亚尔·哈雷尔（Eyal Harel）将于下周接任以色列海军司令，接替大卫·萨尔·萨拉马（David Saar Salama），此前该任命因伊朗冲突而推迟。交接仪式现定于周四举行。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042550190838526297/photo/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @felix_drost : @Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 This also relevant; we do fill in a lot of emergent capabilities with Ukraine on board. https://x.com/igorsushko/status/2042405305544577369 🚨 BREAKING: Zelensky proposes a defensive military alliance that includes the EU + Ukraine, Turkey, Norway, and the UK. This will enable control of the seas, skies, and land of all Europe as the United States withdraws from NATO. The alliance will be stronger than Russia. https://twitter.com/igorsushko/status/2042405305544577369/video/1 - Igor Sushko tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）转发 @felix_drost : @Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 这也很相关；我们确实在乌克兰的参与下填补了许多新兴能力。https://x.com/igorsushko/status/2042405305544577369 🚨突发：泽连斯基提议建立一个防御性军事联盟，成员包括欧盟+乌克兰、土耳其、挪威和英国。随着美国退出北约，这将使该联盟能够控制整个欧洲的海洋、天空和陆地。该联盟将比俄罗斯更强大。https://twitter.com/igorsushko/status/2042405305544577369/video/1 - 伊戈尔·苏什科（Igor Sushko）推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @felix_drost : @Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 Also a tighter political union that would stop the Orbans of Europe to prevent our self defense while also stopping the Sarkozy's from adventures and mistaking national with European interest. Good debate to have! But yes we don't need to have global capab, just near abroad. tweet
text_zh: 努诺·费利克斯（Nuno Felix）转发 @felix_drost : @Felix_Nuno @klaasm67 此外，还需要一个更紧密的政治联盟，以阻止欧洲的欧尔班们阻碍我们的自卫，同时阻止萨科齐们进行冒险，并将国家利益与欧洲利益混为一谈。这是一个值得进行的辩论！但确实，我们不需要全球能力，只需要近邻能力。推文

text: WarMonitor Taiwanese officials tell Reuters China deployed nearly 100 naval and coast guard vessels this week, far above the usual 50–60, warning it may be the “new normal.” https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042549497759166842/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）：台湾官员告诉路透社，中国本周部署了近100艘海军和海警船只，远高于通常的50-60艘，并警告这可能成为“新常态”。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042549497759166842/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 👁 🇭🇺 "Big Brother" in Hungarian, or George Orwell's 1984 in practice: Orbán's digital surveillance system, - OsintFlow According to an investigation by VSquare, in cooperation with Citizen Lab, Hungary's intelligence services have been using tools from the Israeli company Cobwebs Technologies for at least 5 years. At the same time, locally developed tools are also used - specifically through the company SCI-Network Ltd., which acts as an intermediary in procurements. The most powerful product in this system is Webloc (also WebLock / WebLoc). Webloc is a global geolocation surveillance system that monitors hundreds of millions of people based on data from mobile applications and digital advertising. In fact, it involves the use of smartphone advertising identifiers without the knowledge or consent of users. Such practice is considered illegal under GDPR in the European Union. Documents indicate that Hungary has been using these tools since at least 2022. In March 2026, a few weeks before the parliamentary elections, the licenses were renewed. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 👁 🇭🇺 匈牙利语中的“老大哥”，或乔治·奥威尔《1984》的现实版：欧尔班的数字监控系统 - OsintFlow 根据VSquare与公民实验室（Citizen Lab）合作的一项调查，匈牙利情报部门至少在过去5年里一直在使用以色列Cobwebs Technologies公司的工具。同时，他们也使用本地开发的工具，特别是通过作为采购中介的SCI-Network Ltd.公司。该系统中功能最强大的产品是Webloc（也称为WebLock/WebLoc）。Webloc是一个全球地理定位监控系统，根据移动应用程序和数字广告的数据监控数亿人。事实上，它涉及在用户不知情或未经同意的情况下使用智能手机广告标识符。这种做法在欧盟《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）下被视为非法。文件显示，匈牙利至少从2022年开始使用这些工具。2026年3月，即议会选举前几周，这些许可证得到了续期。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇭🇺 According to an OsintFlow report citing a VSquare and Citizen Lab investigation, Hungarian intelligence services have been using tools from Israeli firm Cobwebs Technologies for at least five years. Domestic solutions are also in use, particularly via SCI-Network Ltd., which acts as an intermediary, with the most advanced system identified as Webloc (also known as WebLock/WebLoc). Webloc is described as a global geolocation surveillance platform capable of tracking hundreds of millions of individuals using data from mobile apps and digital advertising, effectively leveraging smartphone advertising identifiers without user consent — a practice considered illegal under GDPR in the EU. Documents indicate Hungary has used these tools since at least 2022, with licenses renewed in March 2026, shortly before parliamentary elections. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇭🇺 根据引用VSquare和公民实验室调查的OsintFlow报告，匈牙利情报部门至少在过去五年里一直在使用以色列Cobwebs Technologies公司的工具。国内解决方案也在使用中，特别是通过作为中介的SCI-Network Ltd.，其中最先进的系统被确定为Webloc（也称为WebLock/WebLoc）。Webloc被描述为一个全球地理定位监控平台，能够利用移动应用程序和数字广告的数据追踪数亿人，在未经用户同意的情况下有效利用智能手机广告标识符——这种做法在欧盟GDPR下被视为非法。文件显示，匈牙利至少从2022年开始使用这些工具，许可证于2026年3月（即议会选举前不久）续期。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarMonitor President Zelenskyy said Ukrainian forces downed Iranian-designed Shahed drones across several Middle Eastern countries during the Iran war. (AP) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042547656212304049/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）：泽连斯基总统表示，在伊朗战争期间，乌克兰军队在中东多个国家击落了伊朗设计的“见证者”（Shahed）无人机。（美联社）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042547656212304049/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Exactly. This isn’t about allies failing the U.S., it’s about the White House trying to reshape NATO into something it was never meant to be. What’s killing NATO isn’t the European refusals to access to US bases, but Trump’s unilateral decision to redefining NATO as a US force-projection tool rather than a collective defense arrangement. That’s the constitutional coup against the alliance. Europe didn’t break NATO, Trump did. https://www.ft.com/content/e2347e81-19b2-4cd5-aea4-ff6bacf0e71b?shareType=nongift - Alberto Alemanno 🇪🇺 tweet
text_zh: 战争监测（WarMonitor）：没错。这与盟友辜负美国无关，而是白宫试图将北约重塑为它从未打算成为的东西。扼杀北约的不是欧洲拒绝开放美国基地，而是特朗普单方面决定将北约重新定义为美国的武力投射工具，而不是集体防御安排。这是针对该联盟的宪法政变。不是欧洲破坏了北约，而是特朗普。https://www.ft.com/content/e2347e81-19b2-4cd5-aea4-ff6bacf0e71b?shareType=nongift - 阿尔贝托·阿莱曼诺（Alberto Alemanno）🇪🇺 推文

Russia plans to expand its army to 2.5 million by 2030. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042545994399662157/video/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Peskov says Dmitriev did visit the US, but insists he's only there for "economic issues" and not Ukraine talks. Putin's envoy Kirill Dmitriev is heading to the US for talks with Trump's team, Reuters reports. The visit comes just before a decision on whether to extend eased Russian oil sanctions expiring April 11. https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/russian-special-envoy-dmitriev-us-meeting-trump-administration-members-sources-2026-04-09/ - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: 战争翻译（WarTranslated）：佩斯科夫表示，德米特里耶夫（Dmitriev）确实访问了美国，但坚称他此行仅是为了“经济问题”，而非乌克兰会谈。据路透社报道，普京特使基里尔·德米特里耶夫（Kirill Dmitriev）正前往美国与特朗普团队进行会谈。此次访问正值关于是否延长将于4月11日到期的俄罗斯石油制裁的决定做出之前。https://www.reuters.com/world/europe/russian-special-envoy-dmitriev-us-meeting-trump-administration-members-sources-2026-04-09/ - 战争翻译推文

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 Russia and Cuba are discussing the resumption of flights - Deputy Foreign Minister Ryabkov at a press conference at the Russian Embassy in Havana. Russia is not going to leave the Western Hemisphere, no matter what they say in Washington, he said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 俄罗斯和古巴正在讨论恢复航班——俄罗斯副外长里亚布科夫在俄罗斯驻哈瓦那大使馆的新闻发布会上表示。他说，无论华盛顿怎么说，俄罗斯都不会离开西半球。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: It’s a pity, but we have to recognize that some Americans feel that it’s not such a big price for us—for peace—to leave our territories. They don’t want to recognize that Putin will lie to them and continue the occupation even after such steps. I think that is the biggest problem: we don’t trust Putin, but they do.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：很遗憾，但我们必须承认，一些美国人认为，为了和平而放弃我们的领土对我们来说代价并不大。他们不想承认，普京会欺骗他们，即使在采取这些步骤后也会继续占领。我认为这是最大的问题：我们不信任普京，但他们信任。

text: Zelensky: With Ukraine, Türkiye, Norway and UK you will control security on the seas — not one sea.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：有了乌克兰、土耳其、挪威和英国，你们将控制海洋的安全——不仅仅是一个海洋。

text: Zelensky: We have to save our country, and then the economy. First of all, security; second is the economy—not the other way around.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我们必须拯救我们的国家，然后才是经济。首先是安全，其次是经济——而不是反过来。

text: Zelensky: Without Ukraine and Türkiye, Europe will not have an army similar to Russia’s.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：没有乌克兰和土耳其，欧洲将不会拥有一支类似于俄罗斯的军队。

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians call for fighting until victory but flee from mobilization - Budanov. "There are real problems, let's say, mental problems in our society. Because, on the one hand, everyone says that we need to fight until victory - and on the other hand, everyone is fleeing from mobilization. And all this is happening at the same time. This is a big, huge problem. He added that when those who serve return from the front, "they will start asking questions to their neighbors who haven't gone." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰人呼吁战斗到底，但却逃避动员——布达诺夫。“我们的社会确实存在问题，可以说是心理问题。因为一方面，每个人都说我们需要战斗到胜利，而另一方面，每个人都在逃避动员。所有这一切都在同时发生。这是一个巨大的问题。他补充说，当那些服役的人从前线回来时，“他们会开始质问那些没有去过的邻居。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ A Russian-flagged supertanker passed through the Strait of Hormuz into the Persian Gulf, marking a rare passage for one of the nation's ships as traders scrutinize every transit through the war-hit waterway.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 一艘俄罗斯籍超级油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾，这是该国船只罕见的一次通行，因为交易员们正在密切关注每一艘通过这个战乱水道的船只。

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇺🇦 "Russia will not give such gifts to anyone." Moscow will respond to any hostile actions of Kiev, and the Armed Forces of Ukraine will not be able to use the Easter truce to gain military advantages, Russian Ambassador At Large Miroshnik stated 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A two-week ceasefire will not return the energy market to normal conditions. Hashem Orei, head of the Union of Iran's Energy Scientific Associations, told IRNA: The two-week ceasefire agreement will not normalize conditions in the energy market, and what has occurred in the form of falling oil prices has been a release of part of the price bubble. If the ceasefire is fully implemented, the normal process of energy transportation will gradually resume, and this can reduce the psychological pressure on the oil market. It is predicted that if the ceasefire is properly implemented, a large number of ships that have been stopped in the region will be able to resume movement. In that case, global oil prices will drop quickly. However, I do not think prices will reach the range of $50 or $60, because concerns still remain in the market. My prediction is that oil prices will likely settle in the range of about $80 to $90, as the market will wait for the outcome of negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 两周的停火不会使能源市场恢复正常。伊朗能源科学协会联盟负责人哈希姆·奥雷（Hashem Orei）告诉伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：两周的停火协议不会使能源市场状况正常化，目前油价下跌的形式只是价格泡沫的一部分释放。如果停火得到全面执行，能源运输的正常流程将逐渐恢复，这可以减轻石油市场的心理压力。据预测，如果停火得到妥善执行，大量停留在该地区的船只将能够恢复航行。在这种情况下，全球油价将迅速下跌。然而，我不认为价格会达到50美元或60美元的区间，因为市场上仍然存在担忧。我的预测是，油价可能会稳定在80美元到90美元左右，因为市场将等待谈判的结果。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from База from Olga: Trump's unhinged wall of text rant denouncing the podcasters who helped to get him elected... but as a rap song. 🤐 @BazaFromOlga
text_zh: 🔄 转发自奥尔加（Olga）的Baza：特朗普那段语无伦次的文字咆哮，谴责那些帮助他当选的播客主持人……但以说唱歌曲的形式。🤐 @BazaFromOlga

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 Zelensky also gives his ideas about the Telegram ban in Russia - of course, trying to stir up fear 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 泽连斯基也发表了他对俄罗斯封禁Telegram的想法——当然，试图煽动恐惧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Financial Times: Trump threatened the NATO Secretary General The Financial Times reported on Friday, citing unnamed sources, that Trump threatened during a meeting with Rutte to punish those NATO member countries that did not assist Washington in the war against Iran. According to the report: "According to people familiar with the closed-door negotiations, Trump was angry during his meeting with Rutte at the White House. He threatened to punish European countries that he believed did not sufficiently support [operations against Iran]." Meanwhile, Financial Times sources added that Trump did not specify what actions he might take against these countries.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 《金融时报》：特朗普威胁北约秘书长。《金融时报》周五援引未具名消息来源报道称，特朗普在与吕特（Rutte）会面时威胁要惩罚那些在对伊战争中不协助华盛顿的北约成员国。据报道：“据熟悉闭门谈判的人士称，特朗普在白宫与吕特会面时非常愤怒。他威胁要惩罚那些他认为没有充分支持[对伊行动]的欧洲国家。”与此同时，《金融时报》的消息来源补充说，特朗普没有具体说明他可能对这些国家采取什么行动。

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 Zelensky thinks that Russia will be scared by the NATO summit ‘It's important that there be enough pressure on Russia. For example, partners could hold an absolutely unprecedented, historic, pivotal, and, in a certain sense, victorious NATO summit this year. But this depends on them — what they are really ready for and how responsibly they approach the threats that are directed not against one person, but against everyone.’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 泽连斯基认为俄罗斯会被北约峰会吓倒。“重要的是要对俄罗斯施加足够的压力。例如，合作伙伴今年可以举行一次绝对史无前例、具有历史意义、关键且在某种意义上是胜利的北约峰会。但这取决于他们——他们真正准备好什么，以及他们如何负责任地对待那些不是针对一个人，而是针对所有人的威胁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 Zelensky wants to secure the deployment of US and European military bases in Ukraine as part of post-war security guarantees. "If we're talking about reliable security guarantees, that means we need sufficient air defense systems. I don't believe that the Russians won't want to come again. But I believe that if there's an American military base or a joint American-European base in Ukraine, we'll have fewer risks," the president said during a conversation with journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 泽连斯基希望确保在乌克兰部署美国和欧洲的军事基地，作为战后安全保障的一部分。“如果我们谈论可靠的安全保障，这意味着我们需要足够的防空系统。我不相信俄罗斯人不会想再来。但我相信，如果乌克兰有美国军事基地或美欧联合基地，我们的风险就会降低，”总统在与记者交谈时说。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Zelensky claims that they kill as many Russians a month as Russia manages to mobilize - but the number of Russian troops in Ukraine is still increasing "In a month, we destroy the same number of occupiers that they mobilize, but at the same time, the number of their military groups in Ukraine is increasing. That is, we believe that they are increasing their grouping by involving military personnel from the strategic reserve. And we discussed this with the Commander-in-Chief and the Chief of the General Staff - how to counteract it," Zelensky told journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基声称他们每月消灭的俄罗斯人数量与俄罗斯设法动员的人数相当——但乌克兰境内的俄罗斯军队数量仍在增加。“一个月内，我们消灭的占领者数量与他们动员的人数相当，但与此同时，他们在乌克兰的军事集团数量却在增加。也就是说，我们认为他们通过动员战略预备役的军事人员来增加他们的兵力。我们与总司令及总参谋长讨论了如何应对这一问题，”泽连斯基告诉记者。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, Zelensky said. "If Russia chooses the path of de-escalation, I believe that a trilateral meeting will take place. And they will try to hold it in April, May or June. I think these are key months for them. And I think it will be very difficult for us until September. This spring-summer period will be challenging - both politically and diplomatically. There may be pressure on Ukraine. And it will also be on the battlefield," Zelensky said in an interview with journalists. He believes that if this pressure does not result in a solution, the US will withdraw from the negotiations before the Congress elections. "In my opinion, the Americans will not give anyone more time for this dialogue. The US will increasingly focus on internal processes - the elections - starting from the summer. And I think they have a kind of internal political deadline - roughly August," Zelensky said. He says that it is during this period that Russia may intensify its actions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将在9月前进入一个承受俄罗斯前线压力和美国谈判压力的困难时期。“如果俄罗斯选择缓和局势的道路，我相信三方会议将会举行。他们会尝试在4月、5月或6月举行。我认为这对他们来说是关键的月份。我认为在9月之前对我们来说会非常困难。这个春夏时期将充满挑战——无论是在政治上还是外交上。乌克兰可能会面临压力。战场上也会有压力，”泽连斯基在接受记者采访时说。他认为，如果这种压力不能带来解决方案，美国将在国会选举前退出谈判。“在我看来，美国人不会再给任何人时间进行这种对话。从夏天开始，美国将越来越多地关注内部进程——选举。我认为他们有一种内部政治截止日期——大约在8月，”泽连斯基说。他说，正是在这段时期，俄罗斯可能会加强其行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 Trump endorses Orban again 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 特朗普再次背书欧尔班 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chief of Indian Army Staff General Upendra Dwivedi on 2025 India–Pakistan conflict: We made sure that when the people on the other side are going through that Namaz prayer in the terrorist camp, we said this time we'll not touch. Because God is one for everyone.
text_zh: 印度陆军参谋长乌彭德拉·德维迪（Upendra Dwivedi）将军谈2025年印巴冲突：我们确保当对方的人在恐怖营地进行礼拜时，我们说这次我们不动手。因为上帝对每个人来说都是一样的。

text: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The number of settlers wounded in the Iranian and Hezbollah attacks has reached 8,000. Officials in the Zionist regime's Ministry of Health, who usually censor their casualty figures, reported today that during the war against Iran and Lebanon, 7,993 Zionists have been wounded.
text_zh: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在伊朗和真主党的袭击中受伤的定居者人数已达8,000人。通常审查伤亡数字的犹太复国主义政权卫生部官员今天报告称，在对伊朗和黎巴嫩的战争中，有7,993名犹太复国主义者受伤。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The true face of Norman Finkelstein Lebanese have a right to be angry with Hezbollah over sacrifices made for Iran — Norman Finkelstein “They have a right to live… they didn’t want to be sacrificed. Hezbollah also had a responsibility to come to Iran’s aid… attacked by forces seeking to end its civilization.” - > Hezbollah exists because of the occupation. What Norman says about Hezbollah is wrong. Hezbollah was created in response to Israel’s occupation of Lebanon. And no, this footage is not fake or fabricated. Watch the full interview here.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 诺曼·芬克尔斯坦（Norman Finkelstein）的真面目。黎巴嫩人有权对真主党为伊朗做出的牺牲感到愤怒——诺曼·芬克尔斯坦。“他们有权生存……他们不想被牺牲。真主党也有责任援助伊朗……受到试图终结其文明的势力的攻击。” - > 真主党之所以存在是因为占领。诺曼关于真主党的说法是错误的。真主党的建立是为了回应以色列对黎巴嫩的占领。而且不，这段视频不是伪造或捏造的。点击此处观看完整采访。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Everyone keeps asking: when will the Iranian people rise? I don’t say they will rise right away—but at the right moment.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维（Reza Pahlavi）：每个人都在问：伊朗人民何时会起义？我不会说他们会立即起义——但在合适的时机。

text: Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun to Chinese President Xi in Beijing: Today... I deeply feel the concerned gaze of the entire world. Kuomintang and the Communist Party to jointly promote the institutionalization of cross-strait peace. Based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence, the two sides should further plan and construct institutional and sustainable dialogue and cooperation mechanisms. To make the peaceful development of the two sides irreversible, and to fundamentally eliminate all root causes of conflict.
text_zh: 台湾反对派领导人郑丽文在北京对中国国家主席习近平表示：今天……我深切感受到全世界关切的目光。国民党与共产党共同推动两岸和平制度化。在坚持“九二共识”、反对“台独”的共同政治基础上，双方应进一步规划和构建制度化、可持续的对话与合作机制。使两岸和平发展不可逆转，从根本上消除一切冲突根源。
